message: 🌱 Add etcd: Output Inconsistency with json writer  mission (#597)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "etcd-9975-output-inconsistency-with-json-writer",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "etcd: Output Inconsistency with json writer ",
+    "description": "Output Inconsistency with json writer . Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current etcd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your etcd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nhelm list -n etcd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working etcd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review etcd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant etcd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl get configmap -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=etcd\n```\nEtcd version:\n```\nETCDCTL_API=3 etcdctl --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/peer.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/peer.key --endpoints=[https://127.0.0.1:2379] version\netcdctl version: 3.2.18\nAPI version:"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Output Inconsistency with json writer ",
+        "description": "We also encountered issue #9975 #9535, this pr supports to print memberlist in hex format json and does not break backward compatibility.\nIt seems to be a simple problem, but it is not so elegant to solve. I prefer to implement Marshal MemberListResponse manually, rather than redefining a redundant\n```yaml\nETCDCTL_API=3 etcdctl --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/peer.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/peer.key --endpoints=[https://127.0.0.1:2379] version\netcdctl version: 3.2.18\nAPI version: 3.2\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n etcd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd\nkubectl get events -n etcd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Output Inconsistency with json writer \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "We also encountered issue #9975 #9535, this pr supports to print memberlist in hex format json and does not break backward compatibility.\nIt seems to be a simple problem, but it is not so elegant to solve. I prefer to implement Marshal MemberListResponse manually, rather than redefining a redundant structure to implement the member id Marshal method.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "ETCDCTL_API=3 etcdctl --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/peer.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/peer.key --endpoints=[https://127.0.0.1:2379] version\netcdctl version: 3.2.18\nAPI version: 3.2",
+        "ETCDCTL_API=3 etcdctl --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/peer.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/peer.key --endpoints=[https://127.0.0.1:2379] member list\n3214dd175f565349, started, i-0891498e3531cb084, https://10.97.0.110:2380, https://10.97.0.110:2379\n65bf2e476daa66a4, started, i-02ce67ad669ebcab9, https://10.97.3.79:2380, https://10.97.3.79:2379\n750e1bfd8a0a0b33, started, i-0bbecc2ae92d24ce3, https://10.97.5.118:2380, https://10.97.5.118:2379",
+        "ETCDCTL_API=3 etcdctl --cacert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/ca.crt --cert=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/peer.crt --key=/etc/kubernetes/pki/etcd/peer.key --endpoints=[https://127.0.0.1:2379] member list -w json\n{\"header\":{\"cluster_id\":11891086386631399677,\"member_id\":3608752293884089161,\"raft_term\":19},\"members\":[{\"ID\":3608752293884089161,\"name\":\"i-0891498e3531cb084\",\"peerURLs\":[\"https://10.97.0.110:2380\"],\"clientURLs\":[\"https://10.97.0.110:2379\"]},{\"ID\":7331629602699896484,\"name\":\"i-02ce67ad669ebcab9\",\"peerURLs\":[\"https://10.97.3.79:2380\"],\"clientURLs\":[\"https://10.97.3.79:2379\"]},{\"ID\":8434709927868107571,\"name\":\"i-0bbecc2ae92d24ce3\",\"peerURLs\":[\"https://10.97.5.118:2380\"],\"clientURLs\":[\"https://10.97.5.118:2379\"]}]}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
